audit_items.proof_trace: freenect_init() can fail and set ctx=NULL (malloc failure, USB init failure), but init_thread() ignores return value and passes potentially NULL ctx to freenect_select_subdevices() which immediately dereferences ctx->enabled_subdevices without NULL check.
audit_items.attack_scenario: When freenect_init() fails due to USB issues or memory exhaustion, ctx becomes NULL, causing segmentation fault in freenect_select_subdevices() when accessed via public APIs like freenect_sync_get_video().
